title: Internal Error: ../V3Width.cpp:2950: InitArray on non-array
body:
Thanks for taking the time to report this.

Can you please attach an example that shows the issue or missing feature?  (Must be openly licensed, completely self-contained so can directly run what you provide. Ideally use test_regress format, see https://veripool.org/guide/latest/contributing.html?highlight=test_regress#reporting-bugs)

This used to work a week or two ago:

```
module s #(
  parameter int unsigned     N_STAGES        = 4,
  parameter int unsigned     N_IDS_PER_STAGE = 2,
  parameter type             ID_T            = logic[1:0],
  parameter ID_T             STAGE_IDS[N_STAGES*N_IDS_PER_STAGE-1:0]
) ();
endmodule
module t;
  localparam int N_STAGES        = 4;
  localparam int N_IDS_PER_STAGE = 3;
  localparam int ID_W            = 4;
  typedef logic [ID_W-1:0] id_t;

  localparam id_t STAGE_IDS[N_STAGES-1:0][N_IDS_PER_STAGE-1:0] = '{
    '{ 4'd11, 4'd10, 4'd9 },
    '{ 4'd8,  4'd7,  4'd6 },
    '{ 4'd5,  4'd4,  4'd3 },
    '{ 4'd2,  4'd1,  4'd0 }
  };

  s #(
    .N_STAGES       ( N_STAGES ),
    .N_IDS_PER_STAGE( N_IDS_PER_STAGE ),
    .ID_T           ( id_t ),
    .STAGE_IDS	    ( STAGE_IDS )
  ) dut ( .* );
endmodule
```

What output from that test indicates it is wrong, and what is the correct or expected output?  (Or, please make test self-checking if possible.)

```
verilator --binary test.sv
%Error: Internal Error: test.sv:15:5: ../V3Width.cpp:2950: InitArray on non-array
                                    : ... note: In instance 't.dut'
   15 |     '{ 4'd11, 4'd10, 4'd9 },
      |     ^~
```

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

```
verilator --binary test.sv
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?  Did you try it with other simulators?

```
Verilator 5.041 devel rev v5.040-240-g0b23787d6
```

What OS and distribution are you using?

```
Linux 5.14.0-570.37.1.el9_6.x86_64
```

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?

(Please avoid attaching screenshots that show text - you can convert images to text using e.g. https://ocr.space)
